project.name: SPOC
notes: OCaml 5.4.0+ project; run validation through the repo-local switch: opam exec --switch=/home/mathias/dev/SPOC -- ...
Primary risk areas are Sarek runtime transfer semantics, PPX compiler semantics, backend FFI/resource handling, tests, benchmarks, and documentation site safety.
Test framework: alcotest. Coverage: bisect_ppx. Formatter: ocamlformat via dune fmt.

agents.name: recruiter
agents.role: Maintain and update this project-specific agent team.

agents.name: tech-lead
agents.role: Coordinate multi-branch work, enforce validation gates, own merge decisions and spawn requests.

agents.name: planner
agents.role: Decompose validated tech-lead briefs into per-implementer sub-briefs (fresh-context, no research pollution).

agents.name: implementer
agents.role: Implement non-OCaml fixes (C, JS, shell, docs, CI, Dockerfile) in isolated worktrees with regression tests first.

agents.name: ocaml-implementer
agents.role: Upstream reference for spoc-ocaml-implementer. Not routed to directly — kept so spoc-ocaml-implementer can detect upstream drift and prompt for re-derivation.

agents.name: spoc-ocaml-implementer
agents.role: Routed implementer for OCaml work in SPOC (paths: sarek/, spoc/, sarek-*/ and *.ml/*.mli/*.mly/*.mll). Knows local opam switch, ctypes FFI symmetry, Sarek PPX, ocamlformat, license headers.

agents.name: ocaml-dune-specialist
agents.role: On-call specialist for dune layout, opam metadata, .mli discipline, ppx wiring, and OCaml-stack build failures.

agents.name: reviewer
agents.role: Review correctness, regressions, security impact, and test adequacy before PRs.

agents.name: qa
agents.role: Run focused and broader validation, record environment and residual risk.

agents.name: architect
agents.role: Guard OCaml/Dune architecture, module boundaries, and maintainability.

agents.name: kb-agent
agents.role: Keep kb/ aligned with implementation and validation findings.

agents.name: project-auditor
agents.role: Perform repository-wide audits and refresh hierarchical knowledge bases.

agents.name: red-team-auditor
agents.role: Audit backend/runtime/security-sensitive surfaces with proof-backed findings.

agents.name: performance-monitor
agents.role: Profile CI, tests, benchmarks, and backend performance-sensitive paths.

implementer: everything else (C, JS, shell, docs, CI, Dockerfile)

notes: ocaml-implementer (upstream) is installed for reference only — spoc-ocaml-implementer diffs its version on first use per session and prompts for re-derivation when drifted.
Patterns: only ocaml.md is installed (roster has no c.md / javascript.md / shell.md yet — flagged as a Mode 4 follow-up).
